creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tried to reproduce on a virtual machine with stable/13 and failed. It could be it requires a certain NIC driver to hit the bug. What NIC is yours? Do you use VLAN?

If you are able to check, checking a kernel with one revision before e31579b8558db508dfc3f8fc276611a7c3c93aa1 will be really helpful.
